facebook.content:
When you operate in your true identity, you'll always be on the offense in life. You won't be reacting to circumstances, you'll be creating your own opportunities.

The Bible says, "You are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, God's special possession, that you may declare the praises of him who called you out of darkness into his wonderful light." (1 Peter 2:9)
facebook.fullPost:
When you operate in your true identity, you'll always be on the offense in life. You won't be reacting to circumstances, you'll be creating your own opportunities.

The Bible says, "You are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, God's special possession, that you may declare the praises of him who called you out of darkness into his wonderful light." (1 Peter 2:9)



Watch the full teaching
https://increasingfaith.net/teachings.html

#KingdomLiving #IncreasingFaith #BibleTeaching
facebook.pullQuote: You are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation.

instagram.content:
When you're fighting for God's best in your marriage, don't try to fight your spouse, fight the spirit behind the issue. 
1 Corinthians 2:12 - "Now we have received, not the spirit of the world, but the spirit which is of God." 

You can't change your spouse, but you can change how you respond to the enemy's influence.
instagram.cta: Watch the full teaching → Link in bio
